name: zuldeira-south-fl-leads
title: South Florida Business Leads Scraper
description: Scrapes lead data (names, phones, websites) for salons and firms in Miami, Broward, and Palm Beach.

searchQueries.title: Search Queries
searchQueries.description: Enter business types + location. Example: 'nail salon Miami FL'.

maxResults.title: Max Results
maxResults.description: Total leads to collect per search query.
